LanguageData.TW_EMP_Guided_Missile.label: EMP-Guided Missile
LanguageData.TW_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_EMP.label: EMP Guided Rocket Launcher
LanguageData.TW_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_EMP.descriptio: Fires target-tracking EMP warheads for precision electronic suppression.
LanguageData.TW_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_HE.label: HE Guided Rocket Launcher
LanguageData.TW_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_HE.description: Fires target-tracking high-explosive warheads for precision demolition.
LanguageData.TW_HE_Guided_Missile.label: HE-Guided Missile
LanguageData.TW_Quad_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_EMP.label: Quad EMP Guided Rocket Launcher
LanguageData.TW_Quad_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_EMP.descr: Four-tube launcher firing target-tracking EMP warheads for saturation electronic suppression.
LanguageData.TW_Quad_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_HE.label: Quad HE Guided Rocket Launcher
LanguageData.TW_Quad_Guided_Rocket_Launcher_HE.descri: Four-tube launcher firing target-tracking high-explosive warheads for saturation demolition.
